requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency / Performance of LED Lighting (Zambia energy label vs CN GB 30255)
requirement_topic.zh: LED 照明能效 / 性能（赞比亚能效标签 vs 中国 GB 30255）
requirement_topic.zht: LED 照明能效 / 性能（尚比亞能效標籤 vs 中國 GB 30255）

summary.en: Zambia does not operate an EU-style Ecodesign Regulation with binding minimum efficacy thresholds for lighting. Instead, energy efficiency for lamps and luminaires is addressed through Zambia Bureau of Standards (ZABS) standards (Zambian Standards adopting IEC performance methods) together with regional and national energy-efficiency labelling programmes promoted for lighting products. Where an energy-efficiency label applies, the product is rated on measured luminous efficacy (lm/W) and related performance, and importers must present supporting test evidence at ZABS import inspection. Unlike the EU, Zambia does not impose a single horizontal minimum-efficacy floor that, on its own, blocks market entry for all LED light sources; performance requirements derive from the specific applicable ZS/IEC product standard and any labelling scheme in force. Verify the current ZABS compulsory-standard list and the status of any lighting energy-label programme before relying on a specific threshold.
summary.zh: 赞比亚不实行欧盟式、对照明设定约束性最低能效阈值的生态设计法规。灯具及光源的能效通过赞比亚标准局（ZABS）标准（采用 IEC 性能方法的赞比亚标准）及面向照明产品推行的区域和国家能效标签计划来处理。在适用能效标签的情形下，产品依据实测光效（lm/W）及相关性能进行评级，进口商须在 ZABS 进口检验时提交支持性检测证据。与欧盟不同，赞比亚未设置单一的横向最低能效底线以单独阻止所有 LED 光源进入市场；性能要求来自具体适用的 ZS/IEC 产品标准及现行标签方案。在依赖某一具体阈值前，请核查现行 ZABS 强制标准清单及任何照明能效标签计划的状态。
summary.zht: 尚比亞不實行歐盟式、對照明設定約束性最低能效閾值的生態設計法規。燈具及光源的能效通過尚比亞標準局（ZABS）標準（採用 IEC 性能方法的尚比亞標準）及面向照明產品推行的區域和國家能效標籤計劃來處理。在適用能效標籤的情形下，產品依據實測光效（lm/W）及相關性能進行評級，進口商須在 ZABS 進口檢驗時提交支持性檢測證據。與歐盟不同，尚比亞未設置單一的橫向最低能效底線以單獨阻止所有 LED 光源進入市場；性能要求來自具體適用的 ZS/IEC 產品標準及現行標籤方案。在依賴某一具體閾值前，請核查現行 ZABS 強制標準清單及任何照明能效標籤計劃的狀態。

standards_or_laws: Zambia Bureau of Standards (ZABS) — Standards Act / compulsory standards and import inspection scheme
Zambian Standards (ZS) adopting IEC performance test methods for LED lamps and luminaires
Energy-efficiency labelling programme for lighting (where applicable in Zambia)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires and light sources). It defines energy efficiency grades based on absolute luminous efficacy (lm/W), with the lowest grade being the minimum for CN market entry. The China Energy Label (CEL) registration is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products and is administered by SAMR. GB 30255 is the binding CN energy-efficiency baseline; it is calculated and registered differently from any Zambian labelling scheme and there is no mutual recognition.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255（LED 室内照明产品及光源能效要求）。其依据绝对光效（lm/W）划分能效等级，最低等级为中国市场准入的最低要求。中国能效标识（CEL）注册对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求，由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理。GB 30255 是中国约束性的能效基准；其计算与注册方式不同于任何赞比亚标签方案，且不存在互认。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255（LED 室內照明產品及光源能效要求）。其依據絕對光效（lm/W）劃分能效等級，最低等級為中國市場准入的最低要求。中國能效標識（CEL）注冊對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求，由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理。GB 30255 是中國約束性的能效基準；其計算與注冊方式不同於任何尚比亞標籤方案，且不存在互認。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires / light sources (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR

gap.en: Zambia does not impose an EU-style single horizontal minimum-efficacy floor; energy performance is governed by the applicable ZS/IEC product standard and any lighting energy-label programme rather than by one binding lm/W threshold blocking all entry. China's GB 30255 grade does not transfer to Zambia: the China Energy Label registration is not recognised by ZABS, and a CN-graded product must still meet the applicable Zambian standard and present test evidence at ZABS import inspection. Where a Zambian lighting energy-label scheme applies, the manufacturer must supply efficacy and performance test data acceptable to ZABS; CEL documentation alone is not accepted. Confirm whether the specific lamp/luminaire type falls under a ZABS compulsory standard and whether an energy-label declaration is required for the import.
gap.zh: 赞比亚未设置欧盟式的单一横向最低能效底线；能效由适用的 ZS/IEC 产品标准及任何照明能效标签计划管辖，而非由单一约束性 lm/W 阈值阻止所有产品进入。中国 GB 30255 等级不能转移至赞比亚：中国能效标识注册不被 ZABS 认可，已获中国评级的产品仍须满足适用的赞比亚标准并在 ZABS 进口检验时提交检测证据。在适用赞比亚照明能效标签方案的情形下，制造商须提供 ZABS 可接受的光效及性能检测数据；仅凭中国能效标识文件不被接受。请确认具体灯具/光源类型是否属于 ZABS 强制标准范围，以及进口是否需要能效标签声明。
gap.zht: 尚比亞未設置歐盟式的單一橫向最低能效底線；能效由適用的 ZS/IEC 產品標準及任何照明能效標籤計劃管轄，而非由單一約束性 lm/W 閾值阻止所有產品進入。中國 GB 30255 等級不能轉移至尚比亞：中國能效標識注冊不被 ZABS 認可，已獲中國評級的產品仍須滿足適用的尚比亞標準並在 ZABS 進口檢驗時提交檢測證據。在適用尚比亞照明能效標籤方案的情形下，製造商須提供 ZABS 可接受的光效及性能檢測數據；僅憑中國能效標識文件不被接受。請確認具體燈具/光源類型是否屬於 ZABS 強制標準範圍，以及進口是否需要能效標籤聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — no EU-style horizontal minimum-efficacy floor; energy performance and any energy-label declaration follow the applicable ZS/IEC product standard and ZABS import inspection. Verify whether the product type is under a ZABS compulsory standard and whether a lighting energy-label scheme applies.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 30255 minimum grade required for CN market entry; China Energy Label (CEL) registration required

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Zambia does not operate an EU-style Ecodesign minimum-efficacy regime. LED lighting energy performance is governed by the applicable ZS/IEC product standard plus any lighting energy-label programme, verified at ZABS import inspection. China's GB 30255 grade and China Energy Label registration are not recognised by ZABS — the product must meet the applicable Zambian standard and present acceptable efficacy/performance test evidence. Confirm the current ZABS compulsory-standard list and any energy-label requirement for the specific lamp or luminaire type before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 赞比亚不实行欧盟式的生态设计最低能效制度。LED 照明能效由适用的 ZS/IEC 产品标准及任何照明能效标签计划管辖，并在 ZABS 进口检验时核验。中国 GB 30255 等级及中国能效标识注册不被 ZABS 认可——产品须满足适用的赞比亚标准并提交可接受的光效/性能检测证据。出货前请确认现行 ZABS 强制标准清单及具体灯具或光源类型的任何能效标签要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尚比亞不實行歐盟式的生態設計最低能效制度。LED 照明能效由適用的 ZS/IEC 產品標準及任何照明能效標籤計劃管轄，並在 ZABS 進口檢驗時核驗。中國 GB 30255 等級及中國能效標識注冊不被 ZABS 認可——產品須滿足適用的尚比亞標準並提交可接受的光效/性能檢測證據。出貨前請確認現行 ZABS 強制標準清單及具體燈具或光源類型的任何能效標籤要求。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling and Grid Rating for Lighting (Zambia 230 V / 50 Hz vs CN China Energy Label)
requirement_topic.zh: 照明能效标签与电网额定（赞比亚 230 V / 50 Hz vs 中国能效标识）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明能效標籤與電網額定（尚比亞 230 V / 50 Hz vs 中國能效標識）

summary.en: Products entering Zambia must be rated for the Zambian electricity supply of 230 V, 50 Hz (single phase). The 50 Hz frequency matches China, but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V (and 380 V three-phase), so LED drivers and control gear must accept the 230 V nominal voltage and the local tolerance band. Where a lighting energy-efficiency labelling scheme is in force in Zambia (or applicable under a regional Southern African programme adopted by ZABS), in-scope products carry an energy-efficiency declaration/label based on measured efficacy; the supporting test report is presented to ZABS at import inspection. There is no separate EU-EPREL-style central registry obligation imposed by Zambia for LED light sources as of the access date; the operative control is ZABS conformity and import inspection plus any applicable label.
summary.zh: 进入赞比亚的产品须适配赞比亚 230 V、50 Hz（单相）的供电。50 Hz 频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国的 220 V（及 380 V 三相），因此 LED 驱动器及控制装置须接受 230 V 标称电压及当地容差范围。在赞比亚现行（或 ZABS 采用的南部非洲区域计划适用）的照明能效标签方案下，范围内产品须依据实测光效附带能效声明/标签；支持性检测报告在 ZABS 进口检验时提交。截至访问日期，赞比亚未对 LED 光源施加类似欧盟 EPREL 的独立中央注册义务；起作用的管控是 ZABS 符合性及进口检验加上任何适用标签。
summary.zht: 進入尚比亞的產品須適配尚比亞 230 V、50 Hz（單相）的供電。50 Hz 頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國的 220 V（及 380 V 三相），因此 LED 驅動器及控制裝置須接受 230 V 標稱電壓及當地容差範圍。在尚比亞現行（或 ZABS 採用的南部非洲區域計劃適用）的照明能效標籤方案下，範圍內產品須依據實測光效附帶能效聲明/標籤；支持性檢測報告在 ZABS 進口檢驗時提交。截至訪問日期，尚比亞未對 LED 光源施加類似歐盟 EPREL 的獨立中央注冊義務；起作用的管控是 ZABS 符合性及進口檢驗加上任何適用標籤。

standards_or_laws: Zambian electricity supply: 230 V, 50 Hz nominal (single phase)
Zambia Bureau of Standards (ZABS) — import inspection / conformity scheme
Energy-efficiency labelling declaration for lighting (where applicable in Zambia / adopted regional scheme)

summary.en: China's mains supply is 220 V, 50 Hz (single phase) and 380 V three-phase. The China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255 is mandatory for in-scope LED room luminaires and is registered with SAMR-authorised bodies before the label is affixed. The CEL shows an absolute lm/W-based grade. Products are typically designed and rated for the 220 V nominal Chinese grid. There is no mutual recognition between the China Energy Label registration and any Zambian labelling declaration, and a 220 V-only rating may not cover the Zambian 230 V nominal voltage.
summary.zh: 中国市电为 220 V、50 Hz（单相）及 380 V 三相。依据 GB 30255 的中国能效标识（CEL）对范围内 LED 室内照明产品为强制要求，须在贴标前向 SAMR 授权机构注册。CEL 显示基于绝对 lm/W 的等级。产品通常按 220 V 标称中国电网设计和额定。中国能效标识注册与任何赞比亚标签声明之间不存在互认，且仅按 220 V 额定的产品可能不能覆盖赞比亚 230 V 标称电压。
summary.zht: 中國市電為 220 V、50 Hz（單相）及 380 V 三相。依據 GB 30255 的中國能效標識（CEL）對範圍內 LED 室內照明產品為強制要求，須在貼標前向 SAMR 授權機構注冊。CEL 顯示基於絕對 lm/W 的等級。產品通常按 220 V 標稱中國電網設計和額定。中國能效標識注冊與任何尚比亞標籤聲明之間不存在互認，且僅按 220 V 額定的產品可能不能覆蓋尚比亞 230 V 標稱電壓。

standards_or_laws: China mains supply: 220 V, 50 Hz (single phase); 380 V three-phase
GB 30255 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires / light sources (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR

gap.en: Two distinct gaps. (1) Grid rating: China rates to 220 V nominal while Zambia is 230 V nominal — both are 50 Hz, so frequency is not an issue, but the driver/control gear must be confirmed to operate within the Zambian voltage tolerance band; a 220 V-only marked product should be re-rated or re-marked for 230 V. (2) Labelling: the mandatory China Energy Label (registered with SAMR, lm/W-graded) is not recognised in Zambia. Where a Zambian or adopted regional lighting energy-label scheme applies, the manufacturer must produce the efficacy test evidence ZABS accepts and the relevant label/declaration for the import; CEL registration does not substitute. Zambia imposes no EU-EPREL-style central registry obligation as of the access date — the operative gate is ZABS conformity and physical import inspection through an in-country importer.
gap.zh: 存在两类差距。（1）电网额定：中国按 220 V 标称额定，赞比亚为 230 V 标称——两者均为 50 Hz，因此频率不成问题，但须确认驱动器/控制装置可在赞比亚电压容差范围内运行；仅标注 220 V 的产品应重新额定或重新标注为 230 V。（2）标签：强制性的中国能效标识（向 SAMR 注册、按 lm/W 评级）在赞比亚不被认可。在适用赞比亚或采用的区域照明能效标签方案的情形下，制造商须提供 ZABS 接受的光效检测证据及进口所需的相关标签/声明；中国能效标识注册不可替代。截至访问日期，赞比亚未施加类似欧盟 EPREL 的中央注册义务——起作用的关卡是 ZABS 符合性及通过在地进口商的实物进口检验。
gap.zht: 存在兩類差距。（1）電網額定：中國按 220 V 標稱額定，尚比亞為 230 V 標稱——兩者均為 50 Hz，因此頻率不成問題，但須確認驅動器/控制裝置可在尚比亞電壓容差範圍內運行；僅標註 220 V 的產品應重新額定或重新標註為 230 V。（2）標籤：強制性的中國能效標識（向 SAMR 注冊、按 lm/W 評級）在尚比亞不被認可。在適用尚比亞或採用的區域照明能效標籤方案的情形下，製造商須提供 ZABS 接受的光效檢測證據及進口所需的相關標籤/聲明；中國能效標識注冊不可替代。截至訪問日期，尚比亞未施加類似歐盟 EPREL 的中央注冊義務——起作用的關卡是 ZABS 符合性及通過在地進口商的實物進口檢驗。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — product must be rated for 230 V / 50 Hz; energy-label declaration applies where a Zambian / adopted regional lighting label scheme is in force, verified at ZABS import inspection. No EU-EPREL-style central registry obligation as of the access date.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) registration with SAMR-authorised bodies required before affixing the CEL under GB 30255; product rated to 220 V nominal grid

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Confirm the LED driver/control gear is rated for Zambia's 230 V / 50 Hz nominal supply — the 50 Hz frequency matches China but the 230 V nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V, so a 220 V-only product may need re-rating or re-marking. The mandatory China Energy Label registration is not recognised by ZABS; where a Zambian or adopted regional lighting energy-label scheme applies, present efficacy test evidence acceptable to ZABS at import inspection. Zambia has no EU-EPREL-style central registry as of the access date; market access runs through ZABS conformity and physical import inspection via an in-country importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 请确认 LED 驱动器/控制装置按赞比亚 230 V / 50 Hz 标称供电额定——50 Hz 频率与中国相同，但 230 V 标称电压不同于中国的 220 V，因此仅按 220 V 的产品可能须重新额定或重新标注。强制性的中国能效标识注册不被 ZABS 认可；在适用赞比亚或采用的区域照明能效标签方案的情形下，须在进口检验时提交 ZABS 可接受的光效检测证据。截至访问日期，赞比亚无类似欧盟 EPREL 的中央注册；市场准入通过 ZABS 符合性及经由在地进口商的实物进口检验。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 請確認 LED 驅動器/控制裝置按尚比亞 230 V / 50 Hz 標稱供電額定——50 Hz 頻率與中國相同，但 230 V 標稱電壓不同於中國的 220 V，因此僅按 220 V 的產品可能須重新額定或重新標註。強制性的中國能效標識注冊不被 ZABS 認可；在適用尚比亞或採用的區域照明能效標籤方案的情形下，須在進口檢驗時提交 ZABS 可接受的光效檢測證據。截至訪問日期，尚比亞無類似歐盟 EPREL 的中央注冊；市場准入通過 ZABS 符合性及經由在地進口商的實物進口檢驗。
